# LiveMask CI/CD - GitHub Copilot Instructions v3.7

Follow the central AI development rules from livemask-docs.

Key modules to always consider:
- 00-Core-Principles.md
- 04-Multi-Repo-Linkage.md
- 12-Production-Automation-SLO.md
- 13-Multi-Repo-Development.md

When modifying workflows or deployment scripts, always check compatibility with livemask-backend, livemask-nodeagent, and livemask-app repositories.

All changes must be traceable to a TASK-XXXX.
